description.value:
A safety line and harness for rooftop work, rappelling, and vertical descents.

Effect: +30 to Climb Tests while descending a vertical surface and the wearer cannot fall from failing those Tests. Common quality holds 150 kg; Good quality holds 200 kg.

Notes: -
